name: gramps-web-mcp
description: Structured MCP access to your Gramps Web family tree
long_description: Connect Claude Desktop to a self-hosted [Gramps Web](https://www.grampsweb.org/) instance. Browse, search, and optionally edit people, families, events, places, sources, citations, notes, media, and tags through 57 MCP tools.

gramps_api_url.title: Gramps Web URL
gramps_api_url.description: Base URL of your Gramps Web instance (no trailing slash), e.g. https://gramps.example.com

gramps_password.title: Password or token
gramps_password.description: Gramps Web API password or token

gramps_tree_id.title: Tree ID
gramps_tree_id.description: UUID of the tree on your Gramps Web server

gramps_read_only.title: Read-only mode
gramps_read_only.description: When enabled, blocks create, update, and delete tool calls. Recommended for first use.

gramps_media_resources_enabled.title: Enable media file access
gramps_media_resources_enabled.description: Allow thumbnail and full-file media tools. Disabled by default for privacy.

gramps_media_max_bytes.title: Media max bytes
gramps_media_max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes returned by any media download tool

gramps_media_allow_private.title: Allow private media
gramps_media_allow_private.description: Allow downloading media records marked private in Gramps
